strings.DRONE_TIERINFO_GENERAL: Combining Drones combines all their <style=cIsHealth>health</style> and <style=cIsDamage>damage</style>, reduces <style=cIsUtility>skill cooldown</style> by <style=cIsUtility>20%</style>, and adds an <style=cIsUtility>additional effect</style> per tier.
strings.DRONE_HEALING_TIERINFO: Healing beams last <style=cIsHealing>50%</style> longer, healing a total of <style=cIsHealing>50%</style> more per tier.
strings.DRONE_HAULER_TIERINFO: Increases <style=cIsUtility>movement speed</style> while grabbing by <style=cIsUtility>60%</style> per tier.
strings.DRONE_JUNK_TIERINFO: Drop <style=cIsTemporary>2</style> additional <style=cIsUtility>temporary items</style> and <style=cIsUtility>reduce cooldown</style> by an additional <style=cIsUtility>30%</style> per tier.
strings.FLAMEDRONE_TIERINFO: Flamethrower deals <style=cIsDamage>+1000%</style> more damage per tier.
strings.EMERGENCYDRONE_TIERINFO: Can deploy <style=cIsHealing>+2</style> heal beams per tier. Healing beam last <style=cIsHealing>+50%</style> longer and heal <style=cIsHealing>+50%</style> more per second, per tier.
strings.DRONE_CLEANUP_TIERINFO: Increase effect radius by <style=cIsUtility>6m</style> and generate <style=cIsUtility>+1</style> pickup per tier.
strings.DRONE_JAILER_TIERINFO: Jails enemies for <style=cIsUtility>+5</style> seconds per tier.
strings.DRONE_RECHARGE_TIERINFO: Charging beams last <style=cIsHealing>+50%</style> longer, overhealing a total of <style=cIsHealing>50%</style> more per tier.
strings.DRONE_BOMBARDMENT_TIERINFO: Shock an additional <style=cIsDamage>+8</style> times per tier
strings.DRONE_COPYCAT_TIERINFO: Ice Disc bounces up to <style=cIsDamage>+6</style> additional times and freezes for <style=cIsDamage>+1</style> seconds per tier
strings.DRONE_MEGA_TIERINFO: Bullet Barrage fires <style=cIsDamage>+8</style> heavy bullets per tier. Fire <style=cIsDamage>+1</style> pair of explosive rockets per tier.
strings.SQUIDTURRET_SKILL_DESCRIPTION: Fires ink at nearby enemies, dealing <style=cIsDamage>500%</style> damage every <style=cIsDamage>0.75s</style>.
strings.FRIENDUNIT_SKILL_DESCRIPTION: Rams itself into enemies, dealing <style=cIsDamage>400%</style> on light foes and <style=cIsDamage>1000%</style> damage on heavy foes. Damage increases with <style=cIsUtility>movement speed</style>
strings.BEETLEGUARDALLY_SKILL_DESCRIPTION:
Slams nearby enemies for <style=cIsDamage>440%</style>damage.
Fires earth sunders dealing <style=cIsDamage>300%</style> damage.
strings.ROBOBALLREDBUDDY_SKILL_DESCRIPTION: Fires a beam dealing <style=cIsDamage>100%</style> damage per second. Gains increased <style=cIsDamage>damage</style> for each ally and item stack.
strings.ROBOBALLGREENBUDDY_SKILL_DESCRIPTION: Fires a beam dealing <style=cIsDamage>100%</style> damage per second. Gains increased <style=cIsDamage>damage</style> for each ally and item stack.
strings.MINORCONSTRUCTONKILL_SKILL_DESCRIPTION: Fires bouncing projectiles dealing <style=cIsDamage>150%</style> damage. Gains <style=cIsUtility>200</style> armor while out of combat. <style=cIsHealth>Expires</style> after 30 seconds, if owner is further than 100m away.
strings.NULLIFIERALLY_SKILL_DESCRIPTION:
Fires <style=cIsUtility>nullifying</style> void bubbles for <style=cIsDamage>3x100%</style> damage.
Implodes <style=cIsHealth>on death</style>, killing ALL characters caught <style=cIsHealth>instantly</style>.
strings.VOIDJAILERALLY_SKILL_DESCRIPTION:
Fires a shotgun of <style=cIsUtility>slowing</style> void spikes dealing <style=cIsDamage>12x200%</style> damage.
Captures nearby enemies, <style=cIsUtility>nullifying</style> them for 2s.
Leaves a pursuing implosion <style=cIsHealth>on death</style>.
strings.VOIDMEGACRABALLY_SKILL_DESCRIPTION:
Fires a spread of white bombs for <style=cIsDamage>10x80%</style> damage, followed by antimatter dealing <style=cIsDamage>600%</style> damage.
Antimatter explodes white bombs for an additional <style=cIsDamage>600%</style> damage each.
Occasionally fires homing void missiles for <style=cIsDamage>14x30%</style> damage.
Leaves a massive cascading Implosion <style=cIsHealth>on death</style>.
strings.ENGITURRET_SKILL_DESCRIPTION: Rapidly fires bullets dealing <style=cIsDamage>70%</style> damage, for 200% damage per second.
strings.ENGIWALKERTURRET_SKILL_DESCRIPTION: Fires a beam that rapidly deals <style=cIsDamage>40%</style> damage, for <style=cIsDamage>200%</style> damage per second.
strings.EQUIPMENT_LUNARPOTION_DESC: Cannot be used. <style=cIsHealing>100%</style> of <style=cIsHealing>healing</style> is stored in the potion and returned upon using it.
strings.EQUIPMENT_ORBONUSE_DESC: Cannot be used. Purpose unknown. Many unused orb passive items exist in the files but relationship unknown.
strings.EQUIPMENT_ORBITALLASER_DESC: Deal <style=cIsDamage>2000% damage</style> multiple times per second at your cursors location.
strings.EQUIPMENT_SOULCORRUPTOR_PICKUP: Turn targeted low health monsters into a friendly ghost.
strings.EQUIPMENT_SOULCORRUPTOR_DESC: <style=cIsDamage>Instantly kill</style> the targeted monster if its below <style=cIsHealing>25% health</style> and spawn a <style=cIsDamage>ghost</style> with <style=cIsDamage>1600%</style>  damage in it's place. Lasts <style=cIsDamage>30s</style>
strings.EQUIPMENT_ENIGMA_DESC: Previously used for Artifact of Enigma before they decided to use regular equipment that reroll instead of a single equipment activating random ones.
strings.EQUIPMENT_ELITEYELLOWEQUIPMENT_DESC: Increases <style=cIsDamage>attack speed</style> by <style=cIsDamage>50% </style> and <style=cIsUtility>base movement speed</style> by <style=cIsUtility>2</style>.
strings.EQUIPMENT_AFFIXECHO_DESC: Gain 2 <style=cIsDamage>Echoes</style> that will fight for you.
strings.EQUIPMENT_GHOSTGUN_DESC: Shoot nearby enemies for <style=cIsDamage>500% damage 6 times</style> . Shots have a proc coefficient of 0. Supposed to multiply damage based on kills but does not track kills.
strings.ITEM_ANCESTRALINCUBATOR_DESC:
<style=cIsDamage>7%</style> chance <style=cStack>(+1% per stack)</style> on kill to <style=cIsUtility>summon an Ancestral Pod</style> that distracts enemies. 
Once it fully grows, it will hatch into an allied <style=cIsDamage>Parent</style> with <style=cIsHealing>200% health</style> <style=cStack>(+100% per stack)</style> and with <style=cIsDamage>400% damage</style>. <style=cIsDamage>Parents</style> limited to 1 <style=cStack>(+1 per stack)</style>
strings.ITEM_DRIZZLEPLAYERHELPER_DESC: Increase <style=cIsHealing>base health regeneration</style> by <style=cIsHealing>50%</style> and <style=cIsUtility>armor</style> by <style=cIsUtility>70 <style=cStack>(+70% per stack)</style></style>.
strings.ITEM_USEAMBIENTLEVEL_PICKUP: Use the Ambient level as your level
strings.ITEM_USEAMBIENTLEVEL_DESC: Your <style=cIsUtility>level</style> is equal or greater than the <style=cIsUtility>ambient level</style>
strings.ITEM_CRIPPLEWARDONLEVEL_PICKUP: Drop a crippling effigy upon enemy level up
strings.ITEM_CRIPPLEWARDONLEVEL_DESC: When the enemy team level ups, summon a <color=#307FFF>Effigy of Grief</color> <style=cIsUtility>cripple</style> zone <style=cIsHealth>at your location</style>
strings.ITEM_CRITHEAL_DESC:
When <style=cIsHealing>healing</style>, have a chance equivelent to your <style=cIsDamage>critical rate</style> to <style=cIsHealing>double the amount</style>. 
Gain <style=cIsDamage>10% critical chance</style> and then <style=cIsDamage>halve</style><style=cStack> (-33% per stack)</style> your <style=cIsDamage>critical chance</style>
strings.ITEM_WARCRYONCOMBAT_PICKUP: Enter a frenzy at the beginning of combat.
strings.ITEM_WARCRYONCOMBAT_DESC: When entering combat emmit a <style=cIsDamage>War Cry</style> for <style=cIsDamage>6 seconds</style><style=cStack> (+4s per stack)</style> buffing you and allies in a <style=cIsDamage>12m radius</style><style=cStack> (+4m per stack)</style> increasing <style=cIsUtility>movement speed</style> by <style=cIsUtility>50%</style> and <style=cIsDamage>attack speed</style> by <style=cIsDamage>100%</style>. Recharges every 30 seconds.
strings.ITEM_TEMPESTONKILL_PICKUP: Chance to summon a buffing tempest on kill
strings.ITEM_TEMPESTONKILL_DESC: <style=cIsUtility>25%</style> chance on kill to spawn a <style=cIsUtility>buffing tempest</style> which will buff you with <style=cIsDamage>Malachite Elite</style> for <style=cIsDamage>2 seconds</style> and expire after <style=cIsUtility>8<style=cStack> (+6 per stack)</style> seconds</style>
strings.ITEM_MINIONLEASH_PICKUP: Teleport to your master if he is too far away.
strings.ITEM_MINIONLEASH_DESC: You are on a leashed to your master. Teleport you back to him if too far away. If you have no master to be leashed to, lag the game instead.
strings.ITEM_AACANNON_DESC: A unfinished item that does nothing.
strings.ITEM_PLASMACORE_DESC: A unfinished item that does nothing.
strings.ITEM_PLANTONHIT_DESC: A unfinished item that does nothing. Potentially On Hit idea for Deskplant.
strings.ITEM_MAGEATTUNEMENT_DESC: A unfinished, non functioning idea for Artificer changing her skills, based on how many Fire, Ice and Lightning items you had.
strings.ITEM_GHOST_PICKUP: Become a Ghost without a hitbox.
strings.ITEM_GHOST_DESC: Become permamently <style=cIsUtility>immune to damage</style> and <style=cIsUtility>undetectable</style> if you don't deal damage
strings.ITEM_TELEPORTWHENOOB_PICKUP: Teleport to safety when out of bounds.
strings.ITEM_TELEPORTWHENOOB_DESC: You will teleport back to the map when out of bounds. This is just for enemies as players do this normally.
strings.ITEM_MINHEALTHPERCENTAGE_PICKUP: Prevent HP from going below an amount
strings.ITEM_MINHEALTHPERCENTAGE_DESC: <style=cIsHealing>Health</style> will not go below <style=cIsHealing>1%<style=cStack> (+1% per stack)
strings.ITEM_INVADINGDOPPELGANGER_DESC: Reduce <style=cIsDamage>damage</style> by <style=cIsDamage>96%</style> and increase <style=cIsHealing>maximum health</style> by <style=cIsHealing>900%</style>.
strings.ITEM_ADAPTIVEARMOR_DESC: Gain upwards of <style=cIsUtility>400 Armor</style> depending on the amount of damage taken recently
strings.ITEM_SKULLCOUNTER_DESC:
Proof of a specific kind of kill. Has no direct effect of its own. 
Previously used for Bandits Desperado skill
strings.ITEM_TEAMSIZEDAMAGEBONUS_DESC: Increases <style=cIsDamage>damage</style> by <style=cIsDamage>100% <style=cStack>(+100% per stack)</style></style> for every <style=cIsUtility>minion</style> you own.
strings.ITEM_CONVERTCRITCHANCETOCRITDAMAGE_PICKU: Convert all crit chance into crit damage multiplier
strings.ITEM_CONVERTCRITCHANCETOCRITDAMAGE_DESC: All <style=cIsDamage>crit chance</style> will be converted into <style=cIsDamage>crit damage multiplier</style> making them deal more damage. You will be unable to deal <style=cIsDamage>Critical Strikes</style> randomly.
strings.ITEM_VOIDMANPASSIVEITEM_DESC: A item at one point responsible for Void Fiends passive, however, his passive is no longer tied to it.
strings.ITEM_GUMMYCLONEIDENTIFIER_PICKUP: Turn into a Goobo Gummy clone
strings.ITEM_GUMMYCLONEIDENTIFIER_DESC: Visually turns you into a Gummy character created by Goobo Jr. Kills you after 30 seconds.
strings.ITEM_EMPOWERALWAYS_DESC: A unfinished item that does nothing.
strings.ITEM_DRONEWEAPONSDISPLAY1_NAME: Spare Drone Parts : Common Item Display
strings.ITEM_DRONEWEAPONSDISPLAY1_DESC: Spare Drone Parts common Item Display for Drones.
strings.ITEM_DRONEWEAPONSDISPLAY2_DESC: Spare Drone Parts rare Item Display for Drones.
strings.ITEM_DRONEWEAPONSBOOST_PICKUP: Bonus stats granted by Spare Drone Parts.
strings.ITEM_DRONEWEAPONSBOOST_DESC: Gain <style=cIsDamage>+25%</style><style=cStack>(+25% per stack)</style> <style=cIsDamage>attack speed</style> and <style=cIsDamage>skill cooldown reduction</style>, a <style=cIsDamage>10%</style> chance to fire a <style=cIsDamage>Micro Missile</style> dealing <style=cIsDamage>150%</style> base damage and gain an <style=cIsDamage>automatic chain gun</style> that deals <style=cIsDamage>6x50%</style>damage, bouncing to <style=cIsDamage>2</style> enemies.
strings.ITEM_STATSFROMSCRAP_PICKUP: Gain stackable buffs by carrying <style=cIsUtility>Item Scrap</style>.
strings.ITEM_STATSFROMSCRAP_DESC:
Gain unique stats from each Item Scrap tier:
Common - <style=cIsUtility>+6% move speed</style> <style=cStack>(per stack)</style>.
Uncommon - <style=cIsHealing>+3 hp/s base health regeneration</style> <style=cStack>(per stack)</style>.
Legendary - <style=cIsDamage>+30% attack speed</style> <style=cStack>(per stack)</style>.
Boss - <style=cIsUtility>-15% skill cooldowns</style> <style=cStack>(per stack)</style>.</style>
strings.ITEM_DRONEDYNAMITEDISPLAY_PICKUP: Dynamite Spawner granted by Box of Dynamite
strings.ITEM_DRONEDYNAMITEDISPLAY_DESC: Dynamite Spawner granted by Box of Dynamite
strings.ITEM_DRONEUPGRADEHIDDEN_DESC: Gain 100% max health, 100% max damage, 20% cooldown reduction.
strings.ITEM_SUMMONEDECHO_DESC: Reduce <style=cIsHealing>maximum health</style> by <style=cIsHealing>90%</style> and increase <style=cIsUtility>base movement speed</style> by <style=cIsUtility>66%</style>. Periodically shoot out <style=cIsDamage>homing projectiles</style> dealing <style=cIsDamage>275%</style> base damage and <style=cIsUtility>slowing</style> enemies on hit by <style=cIsUtility>50%</style> for <style=cIsUtility>2</style> seconds.
strings.ITEM_SCRAPWHITE_PICKUP: Does nothing. Prioritized when used with <color=#FAFAFA>3D Printers</color>.
strings.ITEM_SCRAPGREEN_PICKUP: Does nothing. Prioritized when used with <style=cIsHealing>Large 3D Printers</style>.
strings.ITEM_SCRAPRED_PICKUP: Does nothing. Prioritized when used with <style=cIsHealth>Mili-Tech 3D Printers</style>.
strings.ITEM_SCRAPYELLOW_PICKUP: Does nothing. Prioritized when used with <style=cIsTierBoss>Overgrown 3D Printers.</style>.
strings.ITEM_SCRAPWHITE_DESC: Does nothing. Prioritized when used with <color=#FAFAFA>3D Printers</color> and Cauldrons.
strings.ITEM_SCRAPGREEN_DESC: Does nothing. Prioritized when used with <style=cIsHealing>Large 3D Printers</style> and Cauldrons.
strings.ITEM_SCRAPRED_DESC: Does nothing. Prioritized when used with <style=cIsHealth>Mili-Tech 3D Printers</style> and Cauldrons.
strings.ITEM_SCRAPYELLOW_DESC: Does nothing. Prioritized when used with <style=cIsTierBoss>Overgrown 3D Printers</style>.
strings.ITEM_TONICAFFLICTION_DESC: <color=#FF7F7F>Reduce ALL stats by -5% </color><style=cStack>(-5% per stack)</style><color=#FF7F7F> when not under the effects of Spinel Tonic</color>.
strings.EQUIPMENT_QUESTVOLATILEBATTERY_DESC: Falling below <style=cIsHealth>50% health</style> causes this to explode in a large radius dealing <style=cIsDamage>300% the carriers maximum health as damage</style>. Consumed on usage.
strings.EQUIPMENT_AFFIXRED_DESC: Attacks <style=cIsDamage>ignite</style> enemies dealing <style=cIsDamage>50%</style> TOTAL damage over time. Leave behind a <style=cIsDamage>fire trail</style> dealing damage on contact.
strings.EQUIPMENT_AFFIXBLUE_DESC: All attacks leave a <style=cIsDamage>lightning orb</style> which explodes after <style=cIsUtility>1.5s</style> dealing <style=cIsDamage>50%</style> TOTAL damage. Convert <style=cIsHealing>50%</style> of your <style=cIsHealing>health</style> into <style=cIsHealing>shields</style>.
strings.EQUIPMENT_AFFIXWHITE_DESC: <style=cIsUtility>Slow</style> enemies on hit for <style=cIsUtility>-80% movement speed</style> for <style=cIsUtility>1.5s</style>. <style=cDeath>On death</style> leave an <style=cIsDamage>ice explosion</style> <style=cIsUtility>freezing</style> enemies for <style=cIsUtility>1.5s</style>.
strings.EQUIPMENT_AFFIXPOISON_DESC: Enemies hit will have their <style=cIsHealing>healing disabled</style> for <style=cIsUtility>8s</style>. Periodically shoot out 3 <style=cIsDamage>spike clusters</style> dealing <style=cIsDamage>100%</style> base damage. <style=cDeath>On death</style> leave a <style=cIsDamage>Malachite Urchin</style> lasting <style=cIsUtility>20s</style>.
strings.EQUIPMENT_AFFIXHAUNTED_DESC: <style=cIsUtility>Slow</style> enemies on hit for <style=cIsUtility>-80% movement speed</style> for <style=cIsUtility>3s</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Cloak</style> all allies in a large radius.
strings.EQUIPMENT_AFFIXLUNAR_DESC:
Increases <style=cIsHealing>maximum health</style> by <style=cIsHealing>25%</style> and <style=cIsUtility>movement speed</style> by <style=cIsUtility>30%</style>. 
Convert all <style=cIsHealing>health</style> into <style=cIsHealing>regenerating shields</style>. 
<style=cIsDamage>Cripple</style> enemies on hit for <style=cIsUtility>4s</style> reducing <style=cIsUtility>movement speed</style> by <style=cIsUtility>100%</style> and <style=cIsDamage>armor</style> by <style=cIsDamage>20</style>. 
Periodically shoot out 4 orbs dealing <style=cIsDamage>30%</style> base damage when attacking.
strings.EQUIPMENT_AFFIXEARTH_DESC: <style=cIsHealing>Heal</style> a nearby hurt ally for <style=cIsHealing>120%</style> of your <style=cIsDamage>base damage</style> per second. <style=cDeath>On death</style> leave a <style=cIsHealing>Healing Core</style> which will <style=cIsHealing>heal</style> all nearby creatures after <style=cIsHealing>3s</style>
strings.EQUIPMENT_AFFIXVOID_DESC:
Increases <style=cIsHealing>maximum health</style> by <style=cIsHealing>50%</style>
Decreases <style=cIsDamage>base damage</style> by <style=cIsDamage>30%</style>.
<style=cIsDamage>100%</style> chance to <style=cIsDamage>Collapse</style> enemies on hit.
<style=cIsHealing>Block</style> incoming damage once every <style=cIsUtility>15 seconds</style>.
strings.EQUIPMENT_AFFIXAURELIONITE_DESC: On hit, enemies will drop <style=cIsUtility>nuggets</style> worth <style=cIsUtility>$8</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Scales over time.</style> Upon activation or every <style=cIsDamage>12s</style>, launch a <style=cIsDamage>eruption</style> dealing <style=cIsDamage>15% damage</style> then <style=cIsDamage>150% damage.</style>
strings.EQUIPMENT_AFFIXBEAD_DESC: Buff <style=cIsHealing>5 nearby allies</style> in a <style=cIsHealing>35m</style> radius, increasing their <style=cIsHealing>armor</style> by <style=cIsHealing>300</style>. After buffed allies are hurt <style=cIsHealing>10</style> times, fire a homing lunar spike dealing <style=cIsDamage>100% damage</style> and inflicting <style=cIsDamage>Lunar Ruin</style>. Recharges after 10s.
strings.EQUIPMENT_AFFIXCOLLECTIVE_DESC:
Gain a <style=cIsUtility>30m</style> dome that <style=cIsUtility>blocks</style> all outside attacks and reduces <style=cIsUtility>skill cooldowns</style> of all allies within by <style=cIsUtility>25%</style>.
Getting hit by a survivors skill, disables the dome for 8 seconds.
<style=cIsHealth>On Death</style>, explode for <style=cIsDamage>100%</style> damage and disable items for <style=cIsDamage>2.5s</style>.
strings.CONDUITCANYON_P1: Install <color=#F8B651>Sentry Keys</color> to hack the barrier
strings.CONDUITCANYON_P2: Install <color=#F8B651>Sentry Keys</color> to reprogram encrypted teleporter
strings.VOID_SUPPRESSOR_DESCRIPTION: Eradicate the shown item from existence, preventing it from appearing again for the current run. Existing copies of the item will be scrapped instantly.
strings.PLAYER_DEATH_QUOTE_33_2P: You are not OK from this encounter.
strings.PLAYER_DEATH_QUOTE_33: {0} is not OK from this encounter.
strings.FAMILY_PARENT: <style=cWorldEvent>[WARNING] A familial bond is being disturbed..</style>
strings.SKILL_VOIDFIEND_CORRUPT_M1: Fire a short-range beam for <style=cisDamage>2000% damage per second.</style>
strings.SKILL_VOIDFIEND_CORRUPT_M2: Fire a an arcing plasma bomb for <style=cisDamage>1100% damage.</style>
strings.SKILL_VOIDFIEND_CORRUPT_M3: <style=cIsUtility>Disappear</style> into the Void, <style=cIsUtility>cleansing all debuffs</style> while moving at a <style=cIsUtility>fast forward angle.</style>
strings.SKILL_VOIDFIEND_CORRUPT_M4: Crush <style=cIsHealth>25% maximum health</style> to gain <style=cIsVoid>25% Corruption.</style>
strings.ITEM_TREASURECACHECONSUMED_DESC: A spent key to remember an item well earned.
strings.ITEM_TREASURECACHEVOIDCONSUMED_DESC: A spent key? To remember an item well earned.
strings.ITEM_EXTRASTATSONLEVELUP_CONSUMED_PICKUP: Your Prayer Beads have blessed your stats. (Missing Overlay)
strings.ITEM_EXTRASTATSONLEVELUP_CONSUMED_DESC: Prayer Beads have blessed this body. (Missing Overlay)
strings.OVERLAY_EXTRASTATSONLEVELUP_CONSUMED_PIC: Your Prayer Beads have blessed you with +{0} levels
strings.OVERLAY_EXTRASTATSONLEVELUP_CONSUMED_DES: Prayer Beads have blessed this body with <style=cIsUtility>+{0} levels</style>, increasing <style=cIsHealing>max health</style> by <style=cIsHealing>{1}</style>, <style=cIsHealing>regeneration</style> by <style=cIsHealing>{2} hp/s</style> and <style=cIsDamage>damage</style> by <style=cIsDamage>{3}</style>.
strings.OVERLAY_EXTRASTATSONLEVELUP_DESC: Your Prayer Beads have blessed you with <style=cIsUtility>+{0} levels</style>, increasing <style=cIsHealing>max health</style> by <style=cIsHealing>{1}</style>, <style=cIsHealing>regeneration</style> by <style=cIsHealing>{2} hp/s</style> and <style=cIsDamage>damage</style> by <style=cIsDamage>{3}</style>.
strings.DEVOTED_LEMURIAN_DEATH_2P: <style=cDeath>You lost a devotee. Your pack loses {1}{2}</style>
strings.DEVOTED_LEMURIAN_DEATH: <style=cDeath>{0} lost a devotee. Their pack loses {1}{2}</style>
strings.ITEM_REVIVE_MESSAGE_ALL: NOTIN <style=cIsLunar>{0} revived themselves and fallen team members, using {1}</color>
strings.REBIRTH_ENDING_CHAT_ITEM_2P: You will be born anew with {0}.
strings.REMINDER_NEWT:
Find and activate a
<style=cIsLunar>Newt Altar <sprite name="LunarCoin" tint=1></style>
